title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS company backed by $85M+ and trusted by brands like Wiz and Lyft, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role builds and scales the operational backbone of the GTM engine. Requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops within high-growth B2B SaaS, proven experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, including collaboration with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Excellent alignment across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS + Fintech expertise matches cloud cost-management domain, proven RevOps scaling experience, and Salesforce mastery. Tel Aviv hybrid location is ideal match.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed Finout is building out its RevOps function under the CRO—this is exactly the inflection point where your 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM engines becomes invaluable. With your background in high-growth environments and deep Salesforce expertise, you'd be positioned to architect the operational backbone that takes Finout from $85M in backing to predictable, scaled revenue. Given your familiarity with the Tel Aviv tech ecosystem and remote-first approach, I thought this Head of RevOps role might be worth a conversation.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager to redesign territory models and processes for global scalability. You'll partner with Sales leadership, Strategy, and Finance to optimize territory compositions and serve as a key partner providing dashboards and regional insights. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models and segmentation, strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL, and BI tools (Tableau, Retool), and Salesforce proficiency. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD. Experience with territory tools like Fullcast, Pigment, or Anaplan is a plus.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's core RevOps expertise in B2B SaaS GTM strategy, territory modeling, and Salesforce administration. This role directly leverages his 15+ years of experience optimizing go-to-market operations and pipeline forecasting at scale.
ai_opener: Omri here – I've spent 15+ years architecting revenue operations and GTM strategies for B2B SaaS companies, and your territory strategy redesign at Gong is exactly the kind of high-impact work I'm built for. I've optimized territory models, built analytical dashboards, and partnered with sales leadership on segmentation strategies that drove scalability. I'd love to explore how my experience with Salesforce, forecasting, and GTM process design could help Gong nail this critical initiative.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: VulnCheck, a fast-growing cybersecurity company, seeks a Revenue Operations Manager to support the operational engine powering its GTM teams. The role sits at the intersection of Sales, Marketing, Customer Success, and Finance, owning CRM integrity, optimizing revenue workflows, and building reporting infrastructure. Requires 4+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or GTM Systems within B2B SaaS and hands-on Salesforce administration. You'll manage the GTM tech stack (HubSpot, Salesforce, Outreach, Clay, Quotapath) and build dashboards for pipeline health, forecasting, and churn. Remote, US-based.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience far exceeds 4+ year requirement, deep Salesforce/HubSpot expertise aligns perfectly with core tech stack, and cybersecurity/fintech GTM background translates directly to VulnCheck's operational needs. Remote US role meets location flexibility.
ai_opener: VulnCheck's GTM acceleration caught my attention—the orchestration challenges across Sales, Marketing, and CS at cybersecurity scale are exactly where I've built RevOps engines over 15 years. Your tech stack (Salesforce, HubSpot, Outreach, Quotapath) is one I've architected end-to-end, and I've spent years solving the pipeline forecasting and churn analytics problems your role owns. I'd love to explore how to operationalize your next growth phase.

title: Revenue Operations (RevOps) Manager
description: Passage Health is hiring its first dedicated RevOps leader to serve as a core member of GTM leadership and architect of data, insights, and operational excellence across Sales and Marketing. You'll work hand-in-hand with the CEO and GTM leadership to define key metrics, uncover opportunities, and shape strategic decisions. Requires 3+ years in RevOps or BizOps in early-stage startups or consulting, ideally in SaaS or health tech, with a strong analytical and systems mindset and experience building and managing GTM systems and processes.
score_reason: Strong alignment with RevOps focus, GTM leadership involvement, and systems architecture—Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps exceeds the 3+ year requirement. Slight discount due to early-stage startup emphasis (vs. his likely mid-market/enterprise experience) and health tech specificity being outside his traditional wheelhouse, though healthcare SaaS is accessible.
ai_opener: I noticed Passage Health is building out its first dedicated RevOps function—a pivotal moment for scaling GTM operations. With 15+ years architecting revenue operations systems across B2B SaaS, I've spent the last several years exactly where you're heading: translating CEO and GTM leadership priorities into data-driven metrics, process frameworks, and operational leverage that compound revenue growth.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Nooks, an AI Sales Assistant Platform backed by $70M+ from VCs including Kleiner Perkins, seeks its first GTM Engineer. You'll serve as the technical co-pilot for the Sales Development organization, owning setup, optimization, and enablement within the Nooks platform. The company has grown ARR 4x then 3x and plans to 3x again. Ideal for a technically-minded operator who can build and iterate on GTM tooling and workflows in a high-growth sales-tech environment trusted by companies like HubSpot and Rippling.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with RevOps/GTM background and AI-native platform focus. First GTM Engineer role at well-funded, high-growth company matches core competencies in sales tooling, pipeline optimization, and technical enablement.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building RevOps infrastructure at scale in B2B SaaS, and I'm genuinely excited about Nooks' approach to AI-native GTM. Your 4x→3x growth trajectory and focus on SDR enablement through a technical platform aligns perfectly with how I think about modern revenue operations. I'd love to explore how my experience architecting sales tech stacks and forecasting workflows could help you scale this first GTM Engineer role.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Teleport, an infrastructure access platform valued at $1.1B (raised $110M) and trusted by Elastic, Snowflake, DoorDash, and NASDAQ, is hiring a technically-minded and creative GTM Engineer to join the Marketing team and help scale the go-to-market engine. The role blends marketing technology, automation, and creative experimentation. Ideal for someone who combines technical skills with marketing systems expertise and wants to build scalable GTM infrastructure at a fast-moving, engineer-focused B2B security company. Fully remote, US-based.

ai_opener: Teleport's infrastructure access platform and focus on scaling GTM through technical automation caught my attention—it mirrors the work I've done building RevOps engines at scale in B2B SaaS. With 15+ years optimizing pipelines, forecasting, and GTM infrastructure across HubSpot and Salesforce ecosystems, I'm genuinely excited about applying that systems thinking to marketing tech and experimentation at an engineer-first organization trusted by Elastic and Snowflake.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform enabling fast, affordable, high-quality consumer and B2B research, used by global brands like Unilever, Google, and Orange. As Conveo scales for 20x revenue growth, they seek a GTM Engineer who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations. You'll replace manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines, and AI-powered workflows—lead scoring models, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work weekly.
score_reason: Strong GTM and RevOps alignment with lead scoring, attribution, and workflow automation expertise. Misalignment: requires coding/shipping skills (Omri is RevOps/operations-focused, not a software engineer), and B2C research platform lacks his ideal B2B SaaS/Fintech GTM motion experience.
ai_opener: Conveo's 20x scaling ambition and focus on automating manual GTM workflows aligns perfectly with my 15+ years building revenue infrastructure in B2B SaaS. I've architected lead scoring, attribution, and pipeline forecasting systems that eliminated manual work at scale—though I want to be upfront that my strength is designing these operations and GTM motions rather than coding the tools themselves. Happy to explore how my RevOps expertise could complement your engineering-first approach.

title: Head of Growth Marketing - B2B SaaS
description: efficiently, a SaaS platform transforming design and construction team collaboration, is hiring a Head of Growth Marketing to build and scale its B2B growth engine. You'll own demand generation, pipeline creation, and multi-channel campaigns across paid, organic, and outbound channels, reporting directly to the CEO. title: Sales Operations Manager
